content: Hello! My name is Keita Allen, and I am a first-year undergraduate at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology, majoring in mathematics. I am currently interested in mathematical physics and theory of computation, as well as pure math topics in general, and I hope to spend my next years studying and refining these interests of mine.
